title.en: Many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers w...

content.en:
The Blood Saint Palace Lord sighed and said: "The daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix has been accepted as a disciple by the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace, hey, the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace likes to accept a set of apprentices over there, and he attaches great importance to his disciples, just now the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace sent me a message, and I had to let her go!"

"What, the Ice and Snow Palace Lord has spoken!"

Many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were shocked.

No wonder the Blood Saint Palace Lord released the Ice Phoenix Lord without hesitation, although the Blood Saint Palace Lord and the Ice and Snow Palace Lord were both one of the thirteen Palace Masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, but the Blood Saint Palace Lord was at the bottom of the thirteen Palace Masters, and the Ice and Snow Palace Lord was ranked third, and he was also the oldest Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and he had comprehended the three extreme extreme paths.

"The daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix, then she is not an Extreme Dao creature bred by Heaven and Earth, but a descendant of an Extreme Dao creature, which will also be valued by the Ice and Snow Palace Lord?"

"I don't know, it is said that the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace has comprehended the extreme path of fate and likes those creatures who have broken their fate, and the life of the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix has been broken. Of course, the most important point is that the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace looks at the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix. "The Blood Saint Palace is the main way.

Pleasing to the eye?

Many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are helpless, this can only be said that the daughter of the Lord of the Ice Phoenix is too lucky, with the big backer of the Lord of the Ice and Snow Palace.

"Forget about this matter, but in the future, if you use the movement of that Void Spirit Sparrow, you will find a way to lock his position!" After the Blood Saint Palace Lord finished speaking, he left here.

The other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers also left, and this matter was over.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian took out the causal purple flower, this thing is very valuable.

The Extreme Path of Cause and Effect is already very difficult to comprehend, and it is almost impossible to comprehend the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect by relying on a Purple Flower of Cause and Effect.

However, it is naturally very easy to use a causal purple flower to elevate the causal pole path from the beginner to the small success realm, and you can even use the causal purple flower to raise the cause and effect pole path from the peak of small success to the great success realm!

Therefore, Ye Tian looked at the causal purple flower for a while, so he kept it and did not refine it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to copy the causal purple flower, and although the copied causal purple flower could not be refined, with the help of the extreme causal extreme path power contained in the causal purple flower, the effect was still very good.

Ye Tian will then go all out to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect, and if he comprehends the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to a very high level earlier, he will not have to worry about others calculating him.

With the copied causal purple flower, Ye Tian continued to comprehend, and after the causal purple flower was scrapped, he continued to copy.

Under such conditions, Ye Tian's Cause and Effect Extreme Path progressed very quickly.

After hundreds of millions of eternal years, Ye Tian successfully comprehended the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the Dacheng realm, which can be described as extremely fast.

However, from Dacheng to the Consummation Realm, Ye Tian spent nearly five billion eternal years to successfully cultivate the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect to the Consummation Realm.

At this level, it is extremely difficult to continue to elevate the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to the extreme Path of Cause and Effect.

The Causal Extreme Dao does not have any attack power, but it is too special, so it is very difficult to cultivate, and it can be called the most difficult extreme path of the Three Thousand Extreme Dao to comprehend, far more difficult to comprehend than the Time Extreme Dao and the Space Extreme Dao.

"I have comprehended the extreme path of cause and effect in the Perfection Realm, and for the time being, those who are in perfect control of the Extreme Realm will not be able to find me through cause and effect. "

Ye Tian was truly relieved at this time.

Otherwise, if you stay in the Origin Realm Sea, you will be worried about being found by the enemy.

He wasn't worried that he would fall, even if all the copies and clones were killed, there would still be infinite resurrection to be resurrected.

But the Terrans of the Origin Realm Sea will not survive, and will definitely be erased by the enemy.

But now that no one can find his body through cause and effect, the Origin Realm Sea is naturally very safe.

On the other hand, if someone offends him, he can use the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to lock the other party, and unless the other person also has mastered the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect of the Perfection Realm, or has a treasure that can shield the Extreme Path of Perfection of Cause and Effect, he cannot completely hide it.

this day.

Ye Tian sent another replica body to cross from the primordial black sea to the Extreme Deep Sea, and he wanted to copy another Extreme Dao creature body to dive into the Extreme Deep Sea.

The trumpet of the Void Sparrow is wasted, and only another trumpet can be made.

This time, he is going to copy an Extreme Dao creature that has just been born, and then start from a weak point in the Extreme Deep Sea, step by step in the Extreme Deep Sea to grow up, and rise in the Extreme Deep Sea with the image of a peerless genius.

Then, he was valued by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, joined the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and if he broke through to the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller Realm in the future, he could also become a big man in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace!

In the past, Ye Tian didn't dare to do this, because he was afraid of the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect, and the adults of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace could see that there was cause and effect on the side of his replica body and the end of the realm, and after a little investigation, he was exposed.

But now, he has the ultimate path of cause and effect in the realm of perfection, and he can only see through his identity unless he is an extreme path creature who has comprehended the ultimate path of cause and effect.

However, as far as he knew, there was not a single Extreme Path creature in the Extreme Deep Sea who had comprehended the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect.

So, he's safe now, and there's no risk of exposure.

Soon.

Ye Tian erased a golden-winged peng bird that had just been bred in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, this kind of Extreme Dao creature was a relatively noble Extreme Dao creature, and the probability of heaven and earth being conceived was not high.

After Ye Tian wiped it out, he quickly copied the identical Golden-winged Peng Bird.

"It's okay, this replica body is here to keep cultivating, control the cultivation speed, you can't rise quickly all of a sudden!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, this is his own copy body, if he is willing, he can break through to the realm of the perfect controller of the virtual realm in a short period of time, but in that case, wouldn't it be abnormal to expose his identity.

Therefore, this replica body can be improved according to the progress of the peerless genius.

Wow!

Ye Tian's other replica body escaped into the Primordial Black Sea and returned to the end of the realm.

In a short period of time, the golden-winged peng bird replicating body in the Extreme Deep Sea could not help, Ye Tian could only see if he could get a big benefit from the end of the realm.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian continued to comprehend a variety of extreme paths, but it was a pity that without the help of the Extreme Dao Ancestors and the Extreme Dao Monument, the progress of these extreme paths was too slow.

But he also had to comprehend these Extreme Dao, otherwise if the Endless Extreme Dao couldn't enter the Dacheng Realm, he wouldn't be able to attack the Perfect Controller of the True Realm!

Finally, on this day, a piece of good news came.

The Extreme Dao True River invites the perfect controller of the Three Realms who have comprehended the Perfection Extreme Path to help, and this time it will give many benefits, including the benefit of participating in the Extreme Dao Monument.
